overall.description: Cinematic aerial establishing shot of Night City from Cyberpunk 2077, showcasing the contrast between gleaming corporate mega-towers in the background and lower industrial districts in the foreground. The camera holds a wide elevated view over highways and dense urban infrastructure during golden hour, with warm sunlight casting long shadows across the futuristic cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial view of futuristic metropolis with corporate district and industrial outskirts

agents.ego_description: holding a static elevated position overlooking the cityscape, surveying the urban environment

entered.detail: cluster of towering futuristic skyscrapers with glass facades dominating the skyline
curved multi-lane highway overpass winding through the urban landscape
dense collection of lower industrial buildings and structures in the foreground
industrial buildings and debris extending toward the right edge of frame
large vertical advertising structure attached to building facade

segments.scene_description: A static aerial view captures the sprawling cyberpunk cityscape during golden hour. The corporate mega-towers rise in the distant background while elevated highways curve through the mid-ground. Industrial low-rise buildings fill the foreground, creating a layered urban texture. The warm sunlight bathes the scene in a golden hue, emphasizing the contrast between the pristine corporate architecture and the gritty industrial zones.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a sweeping aerial perspective of a futuristic metropolis that emphasizes the stark contrast between industrial grit and corporate opulence. It begins with a wide, static view of the sprawling cityscape, where the warm glow of golden hour bathes the entire urban expanse. As the eye moves across the frame, the perspective shifts from the low-rise industrial buildings in the foreground toward the curving elevated highways of the mid-ground. The scene then expands further into the distance, where the horizon is dominated by gleaming corporate mega-towers rising above the city. Finally, the lighting accentuates the layered texture of the environment, highlighting the divide between the pristine architecture of the heights and the weathered zones below.
